description: All template expressions accessing async data must use optional chaining (?.) and nullish coalescing (??). Browser APIs (window, document) must be guarded with import.meta.client

Locale codes are SHORT in cookies and URLs (sv, en) but FULL BCP-47 in GraphQL/SDK (sv-SE, en-GB). Always expand at the API boundary — never in components or stores. Use event.context.resolvedLocaleMarket as single source of truth
NEVER dispatch planner to decompose and execute all. Orchestrate per-spec: implement → spec review → stage 2 audit → documenter. Each stage is a separate dispatch
Research SDK/API capabilities before planning implementation. Avoids building unnecessary abstractions when features already exist
When SDK types miss fields that GraphQL returns, extend types in shared/types/commerce.ts. Never use as any for known fields
